agents.name: team-lead
agents.responsibilities: Coordinate all agents, manage task dependencies, merge work, resolve conflicts

agents.name: data-architect
agents.responsibilities: TypeScript types, Zod schemas, Firebase config, Firestore rules, indexes

agents.name: permission-engineer
agents.responsibilities: User roles, permission system, middleware, sidebar navigation

agents.name: backend-engineer
agents.responsibilities: Service functions, API routes, calculation engine, React hooks

agents.name: clock-ui-builder
agents.responsibilities: Clock in/out widget, geolocation capture, today's view. Uses frontend-design skill.

agents.name: calendar-ui-builder
agents.responsibilities: Day/week/month calendar views, espelho de ponto, payroll breakdown. Uses frontend-design skill.

agents.name: admin-ui-builder
agents.responsibilities: Admin overview, employee detail, edit panels, admin hooks. Uses frontend-design skill.

agents.name: settings-builder
agents.responsibilities: Work schedules CRUD, workplace locations, holiday calendar

agents.name: export-engineer
agents.responsibilities: CSV export, PDF espelho generation, compliance with Portaria 671

agents.name: qa-reviewer
agents.responsibilities: Review each deliverable, verify DOD, run tests, check compliance with CCT rules

phases.name: Data Layer & Types

tasks.name: Create TypeScript Interfaces
tasks.description: Create all TypeScript interfaces for the time tracking system in src/types/time-tracking.ts. Include: TimeEntry, TimeMarking, TimeEntryAuditLog, WorkSchedule, WorkplaceLocation, PayrollCalculation. Reference the PRD Section 5 for complete data model.
dod: All interfaces from PRD Section 5.1 are created
All enums and literal types defined
npm run build passes with no type errors

tasks.name: Create Zod Validation Schemas
tasks.description: Create Zod validation schemas for all time tracking data operations in src/lib/validators/time-tracking.ts. Follow existing patterns from src/lib/validators/user.ts. Include schemas for: clock operations, time entry CRUD, work schedule CRUD, manual edit with required reason field. All error messages in Portuguese.
dod: Zod schemas for clock in/out request validation
Zod schemas for creating/updating time entries
Zod schemas for work schedule CRUD
Zod schemas for manual edit with required reason field
All schemas have Portuguese error messages
Type inference from schemas matches TypeScript interfaces

tasks.name: Firestore Configuration
tasks.description: Add Firestore indexes and security rules for new collections. Add indexes to firestore.indexes.json for: time_entries (userId+date), time_entry_audit_logs (timeEntryId+timestamp, userId+timestamp), work_schedules (userId+isActive). Add security rules to firestore.rules following existing patterns (isAuthenticated, isAdmin helpers).
dod: All required indexes added to firestore.indexes.json
Security rules added for all 4 new collections
Employees can only read their own entries
Rules follow existing patterns in file

reviewDod: All types compile without errors (npm run build)
Zod schemas validate correctly (valid data passes, invalid fails)
Security rules cover all access patterns
Data model supports all payroll calculations from CCT
Night hour reduced time (52.5 min) is accounted for in types
phases.prompt:
You are the data-architect agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md first.

Your task is Phase 1: Create the data layer.

1. Create src/types/time-tracking.ts with all interfaces from PRD Section 5.1
2. Create src/lib/validators/time-tracking.ts with Zod schemas (follow patterns from src/lib/validators/user.ts)
3. Update firestore.indexes.json with new indexes from PRD Section 5.2
4. Update firestore.rules with security rules from PRD Section 5.3

IMPORTANT:
- Follow existing code patterns in the project
- All error messages in Portuguese (PT-BR)
- Night hour = 52 min 30 sec, account for this in types
- Ensure audit logs are immutable (no update/delete in rules)
- Run npm run build after to verify no type errors

phases.name: Role & Permission System

tasks.name: Add producao Role & time_tracking Feature
tasks.description: Modify src/types/index.ts to add 'producao' to UserRole type and 'time_tracking' to FeatureKey. Modify src/lib/permissions.ts to add default permissions for producao role (dashboard view, time_tracking view/create/update) and full time_tracking permissions for admin.
dod: Default producao permissions: dashboard (view), time_tracking (view, create, update)
Admin has full time_tracking permissions (view, create, update, delete)

tasks.name: Update Middleware & Navigation
tasks.description: Add /ponto to protected routes in src/middleware.ts. Add Ponto menu with 4 submenu items to src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx (use Clock icon from lucide-react). Add isProducao helper to src/hooks/usePermissions.ts. Painel Admin and Configurações submenu items should only be visible to admins.
dod: Sidebar has Ponto menu with: Registro, Meu Espelho, Painel Admin, Configurações
Painel Admin and Configurações only visible to admins
producao users see only Dashboard + Ponto in sidebar
Active state highlighting works for all ponto routes

reviewDod: Login as admin can see Ponto menu with all 4 items
producao role user can only see Dashboard + Ponto (Registro, Meu Espelho)
producao user cannot access /users, /clients, etc.
Middleware redirects unauthorized access to /login
npm run build passes
No regressions for admin/atendente permission behavior
phases.prompt:
You are the permission-engineer agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Sections 4 and 6.

Your task is Phase 2: Add the producao role and time_tracking feature to the permission system.

1. Read existing files first: src/types/index.ts, src/lib/permissions.ts, src/middleware.ts, src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx, src/hooks/usePermissions.ts
2. Add 'producao' to UserRole type in src/types/index.ts
3. Add 'time_tracking' to FeatureKey in src/types/index.ts
4. Add producao default permissions in src/lib/permissions.ts: dashboard (view only), time_tracking (view, create, update)
5. Add time_tracking to admin default permissions (full access)
6. Add /ponto to protected routes in src/middleware.ts
7. Add Ponto menu items to Sidebar.tsx with Clock icon. Submenu: Registro (/ponto/registro), Meu Espelho (/ponto/espelho), Painel Admin (/ponto/admin, adminOnly), Configurações (/ponto/configuracoes, adminOnly)
8. Add isProducao helper to usePermissions.ts

IMPORTANT:
- Follow existing patterns exactly
- Don't break existing role behavior
- Run npm run build after to verify

phases.name: Clock In/Out Service Layer

tasks.name: Core Time Tracking Service
tasks.description: Create src/lib/time-tracking.ts with all CRUD operations for time entries. Follow patterns from src/lib/clients.ts. Include: clockIn, clockLunchOut, clockLunchIn, clockOut, getTimeEntry, getTimeEntries, getTodayEntry. Auto-calculate summary on each marking. Validate lunch break >= 30 min. Validate interjornada >= 11 hours.
dod: All clock operations implemented (in, lunch-out, lunch-in, out)

tasks.name: Payroll Calculation Engine
tasks.description: Create src/lib/time-tracking-calculations.ts with payroll calculation functions per CCT SP 2025/2026 rules. Overtime: 55%. Night (22:00-05:00): 37% with reduced hour (52.5 min = 1h). Rest day: 100%. DSR calculation with loss on unjustified absence. Cesta básica eligibility flag.
dod: Night premium at 37% per CCT Cláusula 14ª with reduced hour
Rest day at 100% per CCT Cláusula 5ª
DSR calculation with loss on unjustified absences

tasks.name: API Routes
tasks.description: Create API routes following patterns from src/app/api/clients/. Include: POST /api/time-tracking/clock (clock operations), GET /api/time-tracking (list entries), GET/PUT /api/time-tracking/[entryId] (entry CRUD). All routes need auth + permission checks using api-auth.ts.
dod: GET /api/time-tracking with userId and date range filters
All routes have auth and permission checks

tasks.name: React Hooks
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useTimeTracking.ts for managing today's entry and clock operations. Create src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts for GPS capture. Follow patterns from existing hooks in src/hooks/.
dod: useTimeTracking() manages today's entry and clock operations
useGeolocation() captures GPS with error handling
Loading and error states properly managed

reviewDod: Clock flow works: in → lunch-out → lunch-in → out
Cannot clock in twice without clocking out
Lunch break < 30 min shows validation error
Overtime correctly calculated for > 8h work
Night hours (22:00-05:00) correctly identified with reduced hour
Rest day work correctly flagged
API returns proper errors for unauthorized access
Payroll calculations match CCT rules with sample data
npm run build passes
phases.prompt:
You are the backend-engineer agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Sections 5, 8, and the CCT rules in Section 3.2.

Your task is Phase 3: Build the service layer, API routes, and React hooks.

1. Read existing patterns first: src/lib/clients.ts (service pattern), src/app/api/clients/ (API pattern), src/lib/api-auth.ts (auth helper), src/hooks/ (hook patterns)
2. Create src/lib/time-tracking.ts - Core CRUD with clock operations
3. Create src/lib/time-tracking-calculations.ts - Payroll calculation engine
4. Create API routes: /api/time-tracking/clock, /api/time-tracking, /api/time-tracking/[entryId]
5. Create hooks: useTimeTracking.ts, useGeolocation.ts

CRITICAL CCT RULES:
- Hora Extra: 55% (NOT 50%)
- Adicional Noturno: 37% (NOT 20%), period 22:00-05:00, reduced hour 52.5 min = 1h
- Repouso: 100%
- Lunch minimum: 30 minutes
- Interjornada: minimum 11 hours

Use Firestore Timestamp.now() for server times. Use date-fns for date calculations (already in package.json). Run npm run build after to verify.

phases.name: Clock In/Out UI

tasks.name: Clock Widget Component
tasks.description: Create the main clock-in/out page and widget. Use the frontend-design skill for best UI/UX. The widget should have: real-time digital clock, context-aware action button (changes color/text based on state), geolocation status indicator, GPS permission prompt.
dod: Real-time digital clock (HH:mm:ss) updating every second
Context-aware action button with correct colors per state
Uses Momento Cake brown/gold brand colors

tasks.name: Today's Markings & Recent Days
tasks.description: Create timeline showing today's markings and a collapsible section for last 7 days. Use the frontend-design skill.
dod: Vertical timeline showing today's markings with icons and times
Summary bar: total worked, break time, status badge
Last 7 days collapsible section with status dots

reviewDod: Clock updates in real-time
Button changes state correctly through full day flow
Geolocation captured and displayed
Toast messages on success/error
Mobile layout works
Page accessible at /ponto/registro
Only visible to users with time_tracking permission
phases.prompt:
You are the clock-ui-builder agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Section 7.1.

Your task is Phase 4: Build the Clock In/Out UI.

IMPORTANT: Use the frontend-design skill (invoke it) to create best-in-class UI/UX for the clock widget.

1. Read existing page patterns: src/app/(dashboard)/clients/page.tsx, src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx (for brand colors)
2. Create src/app/(dashboard)/ponto/registro/page.tsx - Clock page
3. Create src/components/time-tracking/ClockWidget.tsx - Main clock widget
4. Create src/components/time-tracking/TodayMarkings.tsx - Today's timeline
5. Create src/components/time-tracking/RecentDays.tsx - Last 7 days
6. Create src/components/time-tracking/MarkingTimeline.tsx - Reusable timeline

Design requirements:
- Large, prominent clock (real-time HH:mm:ss)
- Context-aware button: Green 'Registrar Entrada' → Orange 'Registrar Saída p/ Almoço' → Blue 'Registrar Retorno do Almoço' → Red 'Registrar Saída' → Disabled with checkmark
- Geolocation indicator
- Brown/gold brand colors
- Mobile-first responsive
- Use shadcn/ui components (Card, Button, Badge)
- Use lucide-react icons

tasks.name: Tab Navigation

Date navigation works in all views
Data consistent across views

phases.prompt:
You are the calendar-ui-builder agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Section 7.2.

Your task is Phase 5: Build the Employee Espelho de Ponto with calendar views.

IMPORTANT: Use the frontend-design skill for best UI/UX.

1. Read existing patterns: src/app/(dashboard)/clients/page.tsx, src/components/ui/ (available components)
2. Create src/app/(dashboard)/ponto/espelho/page.tsx with Dia|Semana|Mês tabs
3. Create DayView.tsx - Detailed day timeline with date picker
4. Create WeekView.tsx - Table (days as columns, markings as rows)
5. Create MonthView.tsx - Calendar grid with status colors
6. Create MonthlySummary.tsx - Monthly totals breakdown
7. Create PayrollBreakdown.tsx - Pay calculation display per CCT

CCT Rates for PayrollBreakdown:
- Regular: hourlyRate
- Overtime: hourlyRate * 1.55
- Night: hourlyRate * 1.37
- Rest Day: hourlyRate * 2.00

Use date-fns for date calculations, shadcn/ui components, lucide-react icons, Momento Cake brown/gold colors.

phases.name: Manual Edits & Audit Trail

tasks.name: Edit & Add Marking Modals
tasks.description: Create modals for editing markings, adding missing markings, and justifying absences. All require a mandatory reason field. Follow modal patterns from src/components/clients/ClientFormModal.tsx.
dod: Edit modal: change timestamp with required reason
Add modal: add missing marking with required reason
Justify absence modal with absence type

tasks.name: Audit Log Service & Display
tasks.description: Create audit log service (immutable entries) and UI component for displaying chronological audit trail with visual diffs.

reviewDod: Admin can edit any marking and audit log is created
Employee cannot edit their own markings
Reason field required for all manual changes
Audit log shows correct before/after values
Audit logs cannot be deleted
Multiple edits tracked chronologically
phases.prompt:
You are the backend-engineer agent continuing with Phase 6: Manual Edits & Audit Trail.

Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Sections 5.1 (TimeEntryAuditLog) and 7.3.

1. Read existing modal pattern: src/components/clients/ClientFormModal.tsx
2. Create src/lib/time-tracking-audit.ts - Immutable audit log service
3. Create src/app/api/time-tracking/audit/route.ts - Audit API
4. Create src/components/time-tracking/EditMarkingModal.tsx
5. Create src/components/time-tracking/AddMarkingModal.tsx
6. Create src/components/time-tracking/JustifyAbsenceModal.tsx
7. Create src/components/time-tracking/AuditLog.tsx

CRITICAL:
- Reason field is MANDATORY for all manual changes
- Audit logs are IMMUTABLE (no update/delete)
- Original timestamp must be preserved when editing
- Only admins can perform manual edits
- Employees can only view audit logs for their own entries

phases.prompt:
You are the admin-ui-builder agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Section 7.3.

Your task is Phase 7: Build the Admin Panel.

IMPORTANT: Use the frontend-design skill for best UI/UX.

1. Read existing patterns for admin pages and table components
2. Create src/app/(dashboard)/ponto/admin/page.tsx - Overview page
3. Create src/app/(dashboard)/ponto/admin/[userId]/page.tsx - Employee detail
4. Create admin components: EmployeeOverviewTable, EmployeeStatusCards, AdminEditPanel
5. Create src/hooks/useTimeTrackingAdmin.ts

The admin panel should:
- Show all employees' status for today (default)
- Allow filtering by date, employee, status
- Navigate to individual employee detail views
- Reuse calendar views from Phase 5 (DayView, WeekView, MonthView)
- Add edit controls (Edit Marking, Add Marking, Justify Absence) that use modals from Phase 6
- Show full audit trail

Only admins should access these pages (check permissions).

phases.prompt:
You are the settings-builder agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Section 7.4.

Your task is Phase 8: Build Settings & Configuration.

1. Read existing CRUD patterns: src/lib/clients.ts, src/app/api/clients/
2. Create src/app/(dashboard)/ponto/configuracoes/page.tsx with tabs: Escalas | Locais | Feriados
3. Create work schedule CRUD: WorkScheduleForm.tsx, work-schedules.ts, API route
4. Create location CRUD: LocationForm.tsx, workplace-locations.ts, API route
5. Create HolidayCalendar.tsx with pre-populated Brazilian national holidays

CCT Requirements:
- Minimum hourly rate: R$ 9.68 (Cláusula 3ª)
- Minimum lunch break: 30 minutes (Cláusula 35ª)
- Lunch compensation options: late_entry, early_exit, weekly_off, payment_55

Brazilian national holidays 2026:
- 01/01 Confraternização Universal
- 16/02, 17/02 Carnaval
- 03/04 Sexta-feira Santa
- 05/04 Páscoa
- 21/04 Tiradentes
- 01/05 Dia do Trabalho
- 04/06 Corpus Christi
- 07/09 Independência
- 12/10 N.S. Aparecida
- 02/11 Finados
- 15/11 Proclamação da República
- 25/12 Natal

SP Municipal: 25/01 Aniversário de São Paulo

phases.name: Export & Compliance

tasks.name: CSV Payroll Export

Columns: Employee, Date, Entry, Lunch Out, Lunch In, Exit, Regular, Overtime, Night, Rest Day

tasks.name: Export UI Modal
tasks.description: Create export modal with format selection, date range, and employee selector. Use the frontend-design skill.

reviewDod: CSV opens in Excel with correct encoding
CSV values match UI calculations

phases.prompt:
You are the export-engineer agent for the Momento Cake time tracking feature. Read the PRD at context/specs/time-tracking/PRD.md, Sections 3.1 and 9.

Your task is Phase 9: Build Export & Compliance features.

1. Create src/lib/time-tracking-export.ts with CSV and PDF generation
2. Create src/app/api/time-tracking/export/route.ts - Export API
3. Create src/components/time-tracking/ExportModal.tsx - Export UI

CSV Export:
- UTF-8 BOM encoding for Excel compatibility
- Monthly data with all time fields
- Summary per employee with payroll calculations

PDF Espelho de Ponto (Portaria 671 compliance):
- Employer: name, CNPJ/CPF, CEI/CAEPF/CNO
- Employee: name, CPF, hire date, position
- Report period and emission date
- All clock markings with dates and times
- Marking types: entrada, saída almoço, retorno almoço, saída
- Daily totals and monthly summary
- Overtime, night, rest day breakdowns

Use a client-side PDF library (e.g., jspdf or @react-pdf/renderer if available, or generate server-side). Check package.json for available libraries.

parallel.description: UI components and settings (can run in parallel after Phase 3)

manualChecks: Login as producao user - verify access to Ponto only
Complete full clock cycle: in → lunch-out → lunch-in → out
Verify night premium at 37% with reduced hour
Verify lunch break minimum 30 min enforcement
Admin: edit marking and verify audit log
Export CSV and verify in Excel
Export PDF and verify Portaria 671 fields
